name: Tiny Rascal Gang
description: The Tiny Rascal Gang (TRG) is a predominantly Cambodian-American gang founded in 1981 in Long Beach, California by Cambodian refugees who escaped the Khmer Rouge genocide. With 5,000-10,000 members and associates in 16 US states (FBI 2009), they are one of the largest Asian gangs in America. A branch split off to form the Asian Boyz. They have alliances with the Wah Ching and 14K triad. The Mexican Mafia 'green-lighted' TRG in the 1990s, leading to war with Sureños. Colors are gray or blue. Members have killed a Sacramento police officer (2007) and committed a mass shooting killing 3 in 2019. In 2023, 1,000 Cambodian-Americans have been deported partly due to TRG activity.

sources.title: DOJ - Tiny Rascal Gang RICO Charges
